title: Colour My Servers
description: Allows you to give colour to your servers and worlds!
body:
## Colour My Servers

Easily customize your server and world names with Minecraft's colour codes and hex colours!

## How to Use

Utilize Minecraft Chat Formatting codes, just like most plugins. Additionally, you can use hex colours with `&#` followed by the hex code.
- Example: `&#FF00FF`
> Check out the available formatting codes [here](https://minecraftitemids.com/color-codes). For hex colour codes, refer to [this guide](https://htmlcolorcodes.com/).
